html:
Exclusive to:

When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.33 days.

The Shoe Horn can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_23".

×3
plainText:
Shoe Horn
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"trinket_23"
Exclusive to:
“I can put my shoes on without help, thanks.”
–Wilson
“It looks like it might melt in a fire.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang does not know which end to blow.”
–Wolfgang
“I don't have a use for it.”
–Wendy
“THE HORN OF WHAT?”
–WX-78
“It reminds me of home.”
–Wickerbottom
“I don't need help putting my shoes on, eh?”
–Woodie
“I was looking for that.”
–Maxwell
“Nöt as useful as a battle hörn.”
–Wigfrid
“Are we supposed to blow on it?”
–Webber
“This seems shoehorned in.”
–Warly
“What's this?”
–Wormwood
“I prefer to break workboots in myself.”
–Winona
“Not to toot my own shoehorn, but I'm great at collecting soles!”
–Wortox
“Not look like a horn, florp.”
–Wurt
“Protect your heels!”
–Walter
“I'll be able to shave a few seconds off my shoe-changing time.”
–Wanda
When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.33 days.
The Shoe Horn can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_23".

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Khi được trao cho Kiến Sư Tử để cống nạp, vật trang sức này sẽ làm chậm cơn thịnh nộ của nó trong 0,33 ngày.
